findings.evidence: Line 61 is `simpa [AmbientIsotopy.final_apply] using hx`; the imported API provides `AmbientIsotopy.final_transport` at `AmbientIsotopyConj.lean:83`, `(Φ.transport h).final z = h (Φ.final (h.symm z))`.
findings.fix: Use the relation-level endpoint lemma explicitly, e.g. `simpa [AmbientIsotopy.final_transport] using congrArg h hx`, so the proof records that transport conjugates the final map.
findings.issue: `postcomp_homeomorph` proves a `Z`-valued endpoint equality from the `Y`-valued `hx` by `simpa [AmbientIsotopy.final_apply]`, relying on unfolding-heavy simplification of `final`/`transport` and homeomorphism cancellation rather than the named transport formula.

summary: One proof hides the transported-endpoint calculation behind a broad `simpa` over endpoint definitions. The rest of the new proofs are short wrappers around existing lemmas and do not raise proof-quality concerns.
